title: Commit Hygiene
description: All commits must be clean: no build artifacts, no secrets, pinned dependencies.

statements.label: No build artifacts in commits
statements.requirement: Commits SHALL NOT include generated build artifacts (dist/, node_modules/, *.class, etc.).

statements.label: No secrets in commits
statements.requirement: Commits SHALL NOT include secrets, API keys, tokens, or credentials.

statements.label: Pin dependency versions
statements.requirement: All dependency versions SHALL be pinned or locked (package-lock.json, requirements.txt with versions).
